purpose: Complete frontend reference for LLM agents. Describes every visual element, component, page, color, typography rule, spacing pattern, layout structure, animation, and interaction in the Next.js web application.

techStack.styling: Vanilla CSS with CSS Custom Properties (globals.css design tokens). NO Tailwind.
techStack.auth: NextAuth v4 with CredentialsProvider (email+password) + EmailProvider (magic link via Resend)

fonts.usage: All headings (h1, h2, .page-title, .section-title, .brand-name, .metric, .hero-title) use Manrope. Body text uses Inter.

background.description: Main page background is #f7f8fa. Cards and surfaces are #ffffff.

sidebar.description: Dark navy sidebar (#0f1729). Active nav item has bright green background (#3ee8b5) with dark text.

text.description: Three text tiers: dark primary (#111827), gray secondary (#6b7280), light muted (#9ca3af).

accent.description: Green accent family. Bright accent (#3ee8b5) used for live dots, progress fills, compliance score, active sidebar. Soft accent (#e6f7f0) for avatar backgrounds, success pill backgrounds.

primaryButton.description: Dark navy primary buttons matching sidebar color.

semantic.description: Status colors with soft background variants. Used in status pills, alerts, and indicators.

borderRadius.description: Cards use 16px. Buttons use 10px. Inputs use 8px. Pills, avatars, and nav items are fully round (999px). Video frames and ROI boxes use 12px.

spacing.description: 8px base unit. Pages padded 24px. Cards padded 18px. Gaps between sections 16px.

pulseDot.description: Green pulsing dot for live indicators. Scales 1 to 1.35 and back, opacity 1 to 0.55.
pulseDot.css: @keyframes pulse-dot { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } 50% { transform: scale(1.35); opacity: 0.55; } }
pulseDot.usage: LiveSessionBanner, settings page, any live indicator

layoutStructure.authLayout: app/(auth)/layout.tsx wraps auth pages in <AuthProvider><GuestLayout>{children}</GuestLayout></AuthProvider>. GuestLayout is identical to DashboardShell (same sidebar, topbar) but allows unauthenticated access.
layoutStructure.dashboardLayout: app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx wraps all dashboard pages in <DashboardShell>{children}</DashboardShell>
layoutStructure.middleware: middleware.ts uses withAuth() from next-auth/middleware. Redirects unauthenticated users to /sign-in. Excludes: api/auth, api/events/ingest, api/ws, api/sessions, sign-in, sign-up, static assets.

appLayout.description: Two-column grid: fixed 260px sidebar + flexible main content area. Below 980px, collapses to single column with static sidebar.

sidebar.description: Fixed 260px dark navy (#0f1729) sidebar. Sticky top, full viewport height. Contains brand, nav, new session button, spacer, profile card.

sections.name: Brand
sections.html: MMilking MonitorCompliance Unit

styles.brandMark: 38x38px, border-radius 12px, background #3ee8b5, color #0f1729, font Manrope 800, grid place-items center

styles.navItem: min-height 42px, flex, align-items center, gap 10px, padding 10px 12px, border-radius 999px, color #c7cdd9, font-weight 650, font-size 14px

sections.name: New Session Button
sections.styles: flex, justify-content center, border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14), background rgba(255,255,255,0.06), color #ffffff, border-radius 999px

styles.profileCard: flex, align-items center, gap 10px, padding 12px, border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1), border-radius 16px, background rgba(255,255,255,0.06)
styles.avatar: 34x34px, border-radius 999px, background #e6f7f0, color #0f7a52, font-weight 800, grid place-items center
styles.name: color #ffffff, font-weight 750, overflow hidden, text-overflow ellipsis, white-space nowrap
styles.signOut: color #ff6b6b, font-size 11px, underline, transparent background, no border

topbar.description: Sticky top bar with page title, subtitle, search, icon buttons, and optional Emergency Stop.
topbar.css: .topbar { position sticky, top 0, z-index 20, min-height 72px, flex, align-items center, justify-content space-between, gap 20px, padding 16px 24px, background rgba(255,255,255,0.94), border-bottom 1px solid #e5e7eb, backdrop-filter blur(16px) }

elements.subtitle: 12px, 'Industrial milking compliance monitoring'
elements.search: width min(30vw, 320px), min-width 220px, padding 10px 12px, border 1px solid #e5e7eb, border-radius 8px, background #f9fafb
elements.iconButtons: 40x40px, border-radius 999px, border 1px solid #e5e7eb, background #ffffff, color #6b7280. Labels: 'N' (Notifications), '!' (Alerts), '?' (Help)
elements.emergencyStop: Red danger button, only shown on /live and /analytics pages

Card.css: .card { background #ffffff, border 1px solid #e5e7eb, border-radius 16px, box-shadow 0 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.04), 0 1px 3px rgba(16,24,40,0.06) }

Grids.grid2: .grid-2 { display grid, grid-template-columns repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr)), gap 16px }
Grids.grid3: .grid-3 { display grid, grid-template-columns repeat(3, minmax(0,1fr)), gap 16px }

StatusPill.css: .status-pill { display inline-flex, align-items center, gap 6px, padding 5px 9px, border-radius 999px, font-size 11px, font-weight 800, letter-spacing 0.04em, text-transform uppercase }

Buttons.base: .button { display inline-flex, align-items center, justify-content center, gap 8px, min-height 40px, padding 10px 14px, border 1px solid transparent, border-radius 10px, font-weight 700, transition 180ms ease }

Inputs.css: .input, .select, textarea.input { width 100%, min-height 42px, padding 10px 12px, border 1px solid #e5e7eb, border-radius 8px, background #ffffff, color #111827 }

Labels.css: .label { display block, margin-bottom 8px, color #9ca3af, font-size 11px, font-weight 700, letter-spacing 0.06em, text-transform uppercase }

DataRows.css: .check-row, .data-row { display flex, align-items center, justify-content space-between, gap 14px, padding 12px 0, border-top 1px solid #e5e7eb }

Label.css: .label { display block, margin-bottom 8px, color #9ca3af, font-size 11px, font-weight 700, letter-spacing 0.06em, text-transform uppercase }

VideoFrame.css: .video-frame { position relative, min-height 180px, overflow hidden, border-radius 12px, background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(62,232,181,0.12), transparent 44%), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #101827, #101827 18px, #111d31 18px, #111d31 36px) }

RoiBox.css: .roi-box { position absolute, inset 34px 48px, border 2px solid #3ee8b5, border-radius 12px }

Donut.css: .donut { width 168px, height 168px, border-radius 999px, grid place-items center, background conic-gradient(#3ee8b5 0 86%, #e5e7eb 86% 100%) }
Donut.inner: .donut-inner { width 122px, height 122px, border-radius 999px, grid place-items center, background #ffffff }

Table.header: .table th { color #9ca3af, font-size 11px, letter-spacing 0.06em, text-align left, text-transform uppercase }

LiveDot.css: .live-dot { width 9px, height 9px, border-radius 999px, background #3ee8b5, animation pulse-dot 2s ease-in-out infinite }

NavCard.css: .nav-card { display flex, align-items center, justify-content space-between, gap 14px, padding 12px }

/sign-in.name: Sign In
/sign-in.layout: Uses root layout (no DashboardShell). Split-screen auth layout.

content: Brand logo (M mark + 'Milking Monitor' text in dark color)
Subtitle: 'Supervise compliance windows, track operator performance, and ensure every milking task is completed correctly.'
Link: 'Don't have an account? Create one' to /sign-up

rightPane.content: Next.js Image component loading /photo.png with fill + objectFit cover. Dark gradient overlay (.auth-visual-overlay). Headline: 'Realtime compliance for every milking position.' (clamp(36px, 5vw, 64px), white, text-shadow)

visualStructure.leftPane: Same brand + title. Subtitle: 'Create a supervisor account to start monitoring compliance, generating reports, and managing operator performance.' EmailSignUpForm. Link: 'Already have an account? Sign in'
visualStructure.rightPane: Same /photo.png image. Headline: 'Build a complete audit trail from every session.'

sections.name: Hero Card (Active Session)
sections.layout: flex, justify-content space-between, gap 24, flex-wrap wrap
sections.left: Status pill (Active/Standby with live-dot), Session title (34px Manrope), Description text in #c7cdd9
sections.right: Compliance score: label + metric (40px, color #3ee8b5) + progress bar (track bg rgba(255,255,255,0.18), fill #3ee8b5)

left.eachPosition: card card-pad with: header (position label + status pill), video-frame placeholder with roi-box, 6 task check rows (TASK-01..TASK-06 with Checked/Pending pills)

right.name: Recent Alerts Log
right.content: rail-list of alert-items. Each shows task name + 'missed' + position. 'Open Live View' button links to /live

sections.name: Main Content
items: LiveSessionBanner (dark-panel card with live-dot, elapsed/total timer, session info, throughput)
grid-2 with 2 cow position cards (video-frame + ROI + 6 task rows with status pills: Completed=green, Missed=red, Unverifiable=yellow, Pending=gray)
LiveSessionStream (SSE connection card showing Connected/Reconnecting status + last 8 events)
TaskChecklist (Process Compliance Checklist with all 6 tasks + Override buttons)

sections.name: Sidebar
sections.content: Recent Alerts Log (rail-list, max 6 items, each with task name + time + position + 'View clip'/'Dismiss' links) + Compliance score progress bar

sections.name: Header Card
sections.content: Title 'Audit History' + subtitle + filter pills (All, Critical, Warning)

sections.name: Logs Table
sections.emptyState: No unit logs have been recorded yet.

sections.name: System Status
sections.content: EquipmentStatus component showing 4 services: Inference Service, RTSP Stream, Event Ingestion, YOLO Model. Each with status pill (Online/Offline/Unknown/Checking)

sections.name: Configuration
sections.content: rail-list of data-rows: Database (PostgreSQL 16, Connected), Authentication (NextAuth.js, Active), Email Service (Resend status), Realtime Events (SSE, Active)

sections.name: Compliance Score + Missed Tasks
sections.left: System Compliance Score: donut chart (conic-gradient) with score% inside + status pill. Side data: completed sessions, missed tasks, avg duration
sections.right: Missed Task Frequency: rail-list of task progress bars showing missed rate per task type

sections.name: Efficiency + Human Factors
sections.left: Operational Efficiency: task progress bars with avg duration
sections.right: Human Factors table: employee name, compliance %, avg speed, status pill

sections.name: Predictive Compliance Logic
sections.content: Title + description about post-dip drift + 'Review Protocol Changes' button

sections.name: Session Info
sections.content: Session ID (truncated), employee name, status, 'Open live view' button, SessionActions (employee reassignment form)

sections.name: Audit Trail
sections.content: Cow processes count, task events count

sections.name: Supervisor Profile
sections.content: Profile card (avatar + name + 'Unit Supervisor' label) + 'Patient/Herd Settings' button linking to /settings/patient

sections.name: Clinical Threshold
sections.content: Range slider for exception sensitivity (20-60, default 32), Notification stream status (live-dot + Enabled), Critical alert escalation status (Live)

/statistics.name: Statistics
sections: Summary card: completed sessions, missed tasks, avg duration

/monitoring.name: Monitoring
sections: Header card with title 'Monitoring' + active session info
Two-column grid: each cow position shows a 3x2 grid of colored tiles (TASK-01..TASK-06) with status colors (green=completed, red=missed, yellow=unverifiable, gray=pending)
System status card with inference service connection indicator

/recommendations.name: Recommendations
sections: Header card with gradient background (blue + red tints)
Risk level metric (colored: green=Low, yellow=Elevated, red=Critique) + recommendation text + data rows (compliance score, missed tasks, active sessions)

/alerts.name: Alerts
sections: Alert cards: each has colored left border (red=critical, yellow=warning), uppercase severity label, task name + position + time
Empty state: green-bordered info card 'No active alerts'

/reports.name: Reports
sections: Header card with title 'Reports' + ReportGenerator button
Recent reports list: nav-card items with session ID, generation date, Download button

DashboardShell.description: App shell with sidebar nav (7 items), brand logo, New Session button, profile card with sign-out, topbar with page title + search + 3 icon buttons + optional Emergency Stop (shown on /live and /analytics). Uses useSession() for user info and initials generation.
DashboardShell.pageTitleFunction: Maps pathname to title: / -> Supervisor Overview, /live -> Live View, /logs -> Unit Logs, /equipment -> Equipment, /analytics -> Analytics, /scheduler/new -> Schedule New Session, /scheduler -> Scheduler, /sessions -> Session Detail, /settings -> Settings

EmailSignInForm.actions: signIn('credentials', { email, password, redirect: false, callbackUrl: '/' })

fields: email (type email, label 'Work email', placeholder nora.smith@farm.com)
EmailSignUpForm.actions: signIn('credentials', { email, password, redirect: false, callbackUrl: '/' })

LiveSessionBanner.description: Dark-panel card showing live status with pulsing green dot, elapsed/total timer (MM:SS format, updates every second via setInterval), session ID, operator name, and throughput (cows/hr).
LiveSessionBanner.timerLogic: Uses useState + useEffect with setInterval(1000ms). Computes elapsed from scheduledStart to now. Computes cowsPerHour from cowCount / elapsed minutes.

LiveSessionStream.description: SSE connection card. Shows green/red connection dot + 'Connected'/'Reconnecting' text. Displays last 8 events as cards with type label, session ID, and JSON payload in <pre>.

TaskChecklist.description: Process Compliance Checklist card. Shows all 6 tasks (TASK-01..TASK-06) with task ID, label, duration, status pill (completed=green, missed/red, anomaly_flagged/red, unverifiable/yellow, pending/gray), and Override button (disabled when no event).

OverrideModal.description: Inline card (not a modal dialog) for manual task status correction. Shows current task label + status, dropdown for new status (completed/missed/anomaly_flagged/unverifiable), textarea for reason, Save/Close buttons. Sends PATCH to /api/task-events/[id]/override with actor_id from useSession().
OverrideModal.layout: Card with border #fafafa background, section-title, muted text, select dropdown, textarea, flex row of buttons

SessionActions.description: Employee reassignment form. Input for new employee name (pre-filled with current), Save button, supervisor email display. Sends PATCH to /api/sessions/[id]/employee with actor_id from useSession().

EquipmentStatus.description: Service health checker. For each service: shows name, URL/detail, and status pill (checking=yellow, online=green, offline=red, unknown=gray). API services are checked with fetch HEAD + 5s timeout. Stream/model services show 'Not configured' or 'Manual check required'.

MultiStepSessionForm.description: 4-step wizard for session creation. Step indicators are pill buttons with numbered circles (active: dark bg + green number, inactive: white bg + gray number).

steps.name: Timing
steps.note: Info card: 'Buffer windows are applied before and after the session...'

steps.name: Review
steps.content: Summary data-rows showing start, end, herd count, operator

MultiStepSessionForm.submission: POST /api/sessions with all fields. Shows success pill on completion.

ReportGenerator.description: Button that triggers POST /api/reports/generate with session_id. Shows status message with report URL on success.

AuthProvider.description: Wraps children in NextAuth SessionProvider for useSession() hook access.

/api/auth/[...nextauth].description: NextAuth endpoints for credentials sign-in, email magic link, session management

/api/sessions.GET: List all sessions (rate limited 120/min). Returns { ok, route, data: SessionRecord[] }
/api/sessions.POST: Create new session (rate limited 20/min). Validates with createSessionSchema. Creates 2 cow_process records automatically. Notifies inference service via POST /session-window. Returns { ok, route, data: SessionRecord, warning? }

/api/sessions/[sessionId]/employee.PATCH: Reassign employee. Validates with updateSessionEmployeeSchema (employee_id as slug, employee_name, actor_id). Creates audit log. Returns { ok, route, data: SessionRecord }

/api/events/ingest.POST: Ingest events from inference service. Bearer token auth (INFERENCE_SERVICE_TOKEN), rate limited 120/min. Validates with ingestEventSchema. If task_id+cow_position+status present, calls ingestTaskEvent(). Always publishes to SSE broadcast. Returns { ok, route }

/api/task-events/[taskEventId]/override.PATCH: Manual task status override. Validates with overrideTaskEventSchema (override_status, reason, actor_id). Updates task event + creates audit log. Returns { ok, route, data: TaskEventRecord }

/api/reports/generate.POST: Generate DOCX report. Validates with generateReportSchema (session_id). Returns { ok, route, data: { report: { id, session_id, docx_file_url, generated_at } } }

/api/ws.GET: Server-Sent Events endpoint. Requires session_id query param. Returns ReadableStream with SSE format. Sends initial 'connected' event, then streams publish() events.

database.client: lib/db/client.ts - Pool with DATABASE_URL, optional SSL

dataFlow.sessionCreation: User fills MultiStepSessionForm -> POST /api/sessions -> createSession() inserts sessions + 2 cow_processes -> notifySessionWindow() calls inference service POST /session-window
dataFlow.inferenceToWeb: Inference service -> YOLO detect -> TaskStateMachine -> EventPublisher POST /api/events/ingest -> ingestTaskEvent() persists to task_events -> publish() broadcasts via SSE -> LiveSessionStream receives
dataFlow.override: User clicks Override on TaskChecklist -> OverrideModal opens -> selects status + reason -> PATCH /api/task-events/[id]/override -> updates task_events + inserts audit_log
dataFlow.reportGeneration: User clicks Download Full Report -> POST /api/reports/generate -> getSessionDetails() -> generateDocxReport() -> createReport() -> Returns JSON with report URL

responsiveDesign.behavior: Below 980px: sidebar becomes static (not sticky), single column grid for auth-shell, dashboard-grid, grid-2, grid-3. Side nav becomes 2-column grid. Topbar stacks vertically. Search becomes full width.

knownIssues: Sanitize function (lib/security/sanitize.ts) only trims whitespace - no XSS protection
Rate limiter is in-memory (Map) - resets on restart, doesn't work across instances
SSE broadcast is in-memory - doesn't work across multiple server instances
Override modal is an inline card, not a true modal dialog (no backdrop, no focus trap)
EquipmentStatus uses no-cors HEAD fetch - always returns opaque response, status detection unreliable
Auth forms (sign-in, sign-up) both use signIn('credentials') - EmailProvider magic link not wired up in the forms
